Get a Bond
License & Permit Bond

Notary Bond

Get commissioned fast with an affordable notary bond. Required by most states before you can perform notarial acts, this bond protects the public and satisfies your state's commissioning requirement.

Apply for Your Bond
Bond Snapshot
Bond Amount$1,000–$25,000
Term Length4–10 Years
Credit CheckRarely Required
Issuance TimeSame Day

Required Documents

To apply for your notary bond, you'll typically need the following:

✓
Completed bond application with your legal name and address
✓
State-specific bond amount confirmation
✓
Notary commission application (if not already filed)
✓
Government-issued photo ID for identity verification

Pricing Notes

Notary bonds are among the most affordable surety bonds available, since notary claims are historically rare and bond amounts are set by state statute rather than individual risk assessment.

Typical Premium

Low, Fixed Rate

Based on your state's required bond amount and term — not your credit score.

Renewal

Matches Commission Term

Your bond term aligns with your notary commission period, typically 4–10 years.

Apply With Our Carrier Partners

We work with A-rated surety partners to get your notary bond issued quickly and affordably.

Apply with Carrier A Apply with Carrier B

Get Bonded and Commissioned

Fast, affordable notary bonds — available in all states that require one.

Start My Application

YOU ARE RESPONSIBLE FOR DETERMINING WHAT INSURANCE PRODUCTS YOU NEED AND IN WHAT AMOUNTS, BASED ON YOUR UNIQUE EXPOSURE TO RISKS AND ABILITY TO BEAR LOSSES. Stephen Wright is a licensed insurance agent in Arizona. Insurance products and features are subject to underwriting criteria and may not be available in all states.
